Operations and Technology Audit

The audit maps operating drag, stack gaps, AI opportunities, and the first fixes worth making. Starts at $6,000 and usually runs 2-4 weeks.

Includes

  • Founder and team interviews across key functions.
  • Technology stack review and gap analysis.
  • AI readiness assessment and automation opportunity map.
  • Prioritized 90-day roadmap with quick wins and structural improvements.
